statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next safe roadmap slice: replaced `tools/audit/Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1`â€™s flaky Edge `--dump-dom` probe with a Python Playwright runner that opens the local `file://` pages directly and preserves the existing smoke coverage.

Updated the Anton state/roadmap/backlog/audit notes to record that the dump-DOM blocker is resolved and future smoke coverage should go into the Playwright path.

Verification passed:
- `Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1` on all default pages
- `Invoke-SiteAudit.ps1 -Tag audit-v275-playwright-smoke -SkipScreenshots`
- Final targeted `Invoke-BrowserSmoke.ps1 -Pages index.html`

No screenshots were captured because this was tooling-only, not a UI change. Next slice: real-device review of Diagnostics/Garage mobile density and Garage restore wording before adding more workflow surfaces.
